name: Visual Website Optimizer
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-54.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-54.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by VWO."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://vwo.com/contact-us/", "children": [{"text": "contact VWO"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Visual Website Optimizer Add-on"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a campaign in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://vwo.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visual Website Optimizer"}]}, {"text": " and copy the smart code generated."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel select "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the Visual Website Optimizer add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste the code into the add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
